title: MultiversX joins Cryptool as an ecosystem partner
content_html:
After months of evaluation, Cryptool and MultiversX have signed an ecosystem partnership.

The decision came down to performance and developer experience: fast finality, low fees, and a tight integration story that will sit behind the upcoming Raise and Portfolio modules. MultiversX is also supporting the build with ecosystem grants, which compresses the timeline to launch.

For Cryptool users it translates into cheaper, faster on-chain operations and a direct line into the MultiversX project ecosystem when looking for new opportunities. Raise and Portfolio, the first modules built on this foundation, go live in the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
excerpt_html: After months of evaluation, Cryptool and MultiversX have signed an ecosystem partnership. The decision came down to performance and developer experience: fast
